posts.author: salbro
posts.title: You pay a fee on every airplane ticket purchased that’s supposed to go directly to fund TSA- but 10 years ago, Congress passed bipartisan legislation that diverted the security fee revenue into a general “slush fund”.

twitter.content:
Many people don’t know this, but we pay a fee on every airplane ticket purchased that’s supposed to go directly to fund TSA.

But 10 years ago, Congress passed bipartisan legislation that diverted the security fee revenue into a general “slush fund”.

Everything is a scam. 😩
